## Which issue does this PR close?

<!--
We generally require a GitHub issue to be filed for all bug fixes and enhancements.
You can link an issue to this PR using the GitHub syntax.
For example, `Closes #12` indicates that this PR will close issue #123.
-->

Closes #

## AI Usage

<!--
If AI tools were used, please answer:
1. Which tools? (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT)
2. Scope of usage? (e.g., autocomplete, generated functions, entire implementation)
3. How did you verify the generated code works correctly?
4. Can you explain every line of the code if asked?

AI-assisted contributions are welcome when they remain under meaningful human

updated, or maintained by an unattended autonomous agent.
